/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/platutils_lib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libplatutils_lib.so -o libplatutils_lib.so CMakeFiles/platutils_lib.dir/Common/src/plat_utils.cc.o CMakeFiles/platutils_lib.dir/Common/src/auto_tick_count.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kilabor/isaac-go2-ros2/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai: liblog_lib.so
